category_sources: source_facts.description says Phylogenetics by maximum likelihood; official IQ-TREE documentation covers phylogenetic tree inference, model selection, and command-line options.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is iqtree3; official homepage and documentation brand the software as IQ-TREE, while the package/repository identify version line iqtree3.
docs_sources: Official IQ-TREE documentation page is at iqtree.org/doc and provides the manual/tutorial PDF.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/iqtree/iqtree3, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies maximum-likelihood phylogenetics; official documentation references tree inference, model selection, and phylogenetic analysis workflows.
